subcodes.title: Words to Mr And Mrs Holbach, spoken on 1914-01-19
subcodes.first_line: The leaders of religion must be the means of binding the hearts together, establishing good-fellowship between the members of the human family
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @symbolism, @religion as basis of morality; of divine civilization, @unity; oneness of humanity, @universal peace; world unity
